executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Whole-stack certification remains blocked by external owner-loop residue; marketing independent verification still fails closed on outcome evidence.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Do not certify green until the external marketing owner loop produces fresh measurable outcome evidence and independent verification passes.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus live artifact cross-checks

findings.title: Marketing remains externally red on outcome evidence
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verification still fails closed (last checked 2026-05-28, verdict=fail) because primary-repo adoption is measurement-pending.
findings.root_cause: Outcome evidence for Codeberg-primary adoption is still missing.
findings.recommended_fix: Let the marketing owner loop produce fresh measurable outcome evidence, then rerun marketing independent verification before calling the whole stack green.

findings.title: Live Gateway topology is clean with zero last-error residue
findings.mechanism: Direct live cron inspection shows 23 enabled jobs, 0 disabled, 0 running (excluding this watchdog), and 0 last-error. Previous run had 6 running and 3 last-error — those cleared.
findings.root_cause: Gateway runtime state normalized since the previous watchdog run; all transient errors self-resolved.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep direct cron inspection as the source of truth. The 0-error state is independently verifiable.

findings.title: Architecture verifier path is green on freshness and ownership gates
findings.mechanism: Loop integrity confirms agent-architecture-watchdog and ralph-docs-watchdog both ok. Architecture independent verification is qualified_pass. Health monitor shows 4 issues, all externally classified.
findings.root_cause: Architecture-side gates are healthy; remaining risk is external.
findings.recommended_fix: Rerun independent verification after each material architecture artifact refresh.

findings.title: Health monitor escalated blocked-channel-recovery to 3 issues
findings.mechanism: Health monitor now lists 4 issues (up from 2): blocked-channel-recovery:timeout, marketing_independent_verification:stale_artifact, and two blocked-channel-recovery_escalation entries. The escalation is correct per three-strikes rule.
findings.root_cause: blocked-channel-recovery has crossed the 3-strikes escalation threshold per HEALTH_MONITOR.md policy.
findings.recommended_fix: blocked-channel-recovery escalation requires independent owner-loop intervention; it is correctly externalized as a watchpoint.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Get a fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Marketing still blocks whole-stack certification even though architecture-owned gates are coherent.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Either clears the remaining adoption blocker or preserves truthful fail-closed outcome ownership.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Address blocked-channel-recovery escalation via owner-loop intervention
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Health monitor has correctly escalated the recurring timeout per three-strikes policy.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Either resolves the blocked-channel timeout or formalizes it as an accepted external watchpoint.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Keep architecture live-topology verification tied to openclaw cron list --json on every watchdog run
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Current live inspection is clean (0 disabled, 0 last-error) and should remain the source of truth.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Stops stale topology claims from reappearing in architecture reports.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Refreshed the audit against the current live view: 23 enabled jobs, 0 disabled, 0 last-error (down from 3). All 6 previously-running jobs completed cleanly and 3 last-error jobs self-resolved.
Live topology is now fully clean with zero errors; architecture-owned gates remain green with all blockers correctly externalized.
Reconfirmed that code-backed marketing consumers still expose machine-verifiable shared market-intelligence consumption.
Health monitor now reports 4 issues (up from 2) after correctly escalating blocked-channel-recovery per three-strikes policy. Escalation is correctly classified as external watchpoint.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms the architecture verifier fails closed on stale signoff, live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable, and the live topology cleaned itself to 0 errors since last run.
independent_verification.previous_artifact_summary: Independent verification confirms the repaired architecture verifier now fails closed on stale signoff, the live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, and shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement.
blocked-channel-recovery escalation resolved via owner-loop intervention.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Marketing remains red on Codeberg-primary outcome evidence
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Architecture-owned runtime checks are coherent, but marketing independent verification still fails closed because primary-repo movement is still measurement-pending.

notes: Live topology cleaned to 0 errors since last watchdog run (was 6 running, 3 last-error). All transient Gateway errors self-resolved.
Architecture green means the architecture-owned verifier path is coherent; it does not mean the whole stack is green.
Health monitor escalated blocked-channel-recovery per three-strikes policy — correctly externalized as a watchpoint.
The remaining blocker is external marketing outcome evidence, not architecture runtime drift.
No live timeout-budget repair was needed this run; the Gateway self-stabilized.
